adapter.output: DetectorFrame.rgb plus sim_time_ns, source_frame_id, and source tag

claim_boundary: deterministic fixture evidence only; practice-only Elodin RGBA adapter, not official UDP JPEG compatibility
commands: uv run --python 3.14 --with jsonschema --with pyyaml --with ruff --with pytest python -m pytest tests/test_practice_adapter.py tests/test_perception_detector.py

known_boundaries.boundary: does not decode UDP chunked JPEG
does not prove official simulator compatibility
strips alpha only; does not perform camera calibration or color conversion

non_claims: not a latency, speed, or reliability claim
not a replacement for the official UDP JPEG receiver

tests.name: test_elodin_rgba_frame_adapter_feeds_round1_detector
tests.purpose: verify practice RGBA frames can enter the existing detector boundary

tests.name: test_elodin_rgba_frame_adapter_rejects_wrong_dimensions
tests.purpose: verify frame dimensions are explicit and validated

tests.name: test_elodin_rgba_frame_adapter_rejects_malformed_pixels
tests.purpose: verify malformed pixels fail before perception

tests.name: test_elodin_rgba_frame_adapter_normalizes_non_sequence_errors
tests.purpose: verify malformed frame containers, rows, and pixels fail with PracticeFrameAdapterError

tests.name: test_elodin_rgba_frame_adapter_validates_frame_metadata_types
tests.purpose: verify frame timestamps and source ids stay typed at the boundary
